criteria.name: brand_voice_match
criteria.description: Output matches Mark's voice rules and the correct brand surface

criteria.name: variant_quality
criteria.description: 3+ meaningfully different variants generated (not just rewording)

criteria.name: platform_optimization
criteria.description: Content tailored to platform norms (LinkedIn length, Twitter concision, etc.)

criteria.name: approval_first_pass
criteria.description: Mark approved without requesting major edits

criteria.name: hook_strength
criteria.description: First 2 lines would stop a scroller (contrarian, surprising, or specific)

criteria.name: voice_compliance
criteria.description: No forbidden phrases, no em dashes, evidence-based framing

criteria.name: engagement_design
criteria.description: CTA invites genuine comments, not empty engagement bait

criteria.name: viral_benchmark
criteria.description: Matches patterns from top 50 decoded posts in the skill

criteria.name: theme_relevance
criteria.description: Selected themes align with current BCI priorities

criteria.name: volume_delivered
criteria.description: Target piece count met (e.g. 5+ pieces per pipeline run)

criteria.name: approval_rate
criteria.description: Percentage of generated pieces Mark approved without major edits

criteria.name: pipeline_completion
criteria.description: All 5 pipeline steps executed without manual intervention
